components.name: agent_excavator
components.purpose: Extracts ideas/projects/plans from all 1,397 conversations using regex + semantic similarity against 6 idea signature vectors.

components.name: agent_deduplicator
components.purpose: Merges duplicate ideas via pairwise cosine similarity with union-find clustering (threshold 0.75).

components.name: agent_classifier
components.purpose: Builds hierarchical idea structure with parent-child relationships, dependencies, status detection, and alignment scoring against behavioral profile.

components.name: agent_orchestrator
components.purpose: Priority scoring engine: frequency(20%) + recency(20%) + alignment(25%) + feasibility(15%) + compounding(20%). Assigns tiers (Execute Now / Next Up / Backlog / Archive).

components.name: agent_reporter
components.purpose: Generates human-readable IDEA_REGISTRY.md with executive summary, tier tables, dependency graphs, and skills gap analysis.

components.name: agent_classifier_convo
components.purpose: Tags every conversation with domain (personal/business/technical/processing/execution/learning), outcome (produced/resolved/looped/abandoned), emotional trajectory, and intensity using 60% semantic + 40% keyword hybrid scoring.

components.name: agent_synthesizer
components.purpose: Reads all analysis files and cross-references data to answer 30 behavioral audit questions across 6 layers (Identity, Power, Execution, Decision, Emotional, Opportunity).

components.name: governor_daily
components.purpose: Daily governance pipeline: computes operating mode (CLOSURE/MAINTENANCE/BUILD), detects lane violations, generates daily brief with binary decisions.

components.name: governor_weekly
components.purpose: Weekly governance pipeline: reality check (where time went), lane progress, autonomy proposals, lane integrity audit, stop list, and 3-5 binary decisions.

components.name: loops
components.purpose: Detects open cognitive loops from conversations by scoring intent vs completion signals. Produces ranked list of unresolved loops.

components.name: completion_stats
components.purpose: Computes closure/archive/decision statistics from loop_decisions table. Weekly and lifetime breakdowns.

components.name: export_cognitive_state
components.purpose: Calls cognitive_api.py to assemble full cognitive state, validates against CognitiveMetricsComputed schema, writes output.

components.name: cognitive_api
components.purpose: Core data assembly layer. Queries results.db for state, open loops, closure backlog, topics, and outputs structured JSON to stdout.

components.name: route_today
components.purpose: Determines daily operating mode (CLOSURE/MAINTENANCE/BUILD) from closure ratio and open loop count. Outputs routing directive.

components.name: export_daily_payload
components.purpose: Builds CycleBoard input payload from cognitive state. Validates against DailyPayload.v1 schema.

components.name: wire_cycleboard
components.purpose: Copies cognitive_state.json into cycleboard directory so CycleBoard HTML can fetch it.

components.name: reporter
components.purpose: Appends timestamped radar output (rising/falling topics) to STATE_HISTORY.md.

components.name: radar
components.purpose: Computes rising and falling topic trends by comparing last 90 days vs previous 90 days of topic weights.

components.name: resurfacer
components.purpose: Resurfaces the oldest high-score open loop with its original conversation context for review.

components.name: build_dashboard
components.purpose: Generates dashboard.html from STATE_HISTORY.md, loops, completion stats, and loop decisions.

components.name: build_projection
components.purpose: Combines cognitive_state.json with daily routing into a single stamped projection artifact for delta-kernel ingestion.

components.name: push_to_delta
components.purpose: POSTs today.json projection to delta-kernel API at localhost:3001/api/ingest/cognitive. Bridge between Python and TypeScript layers.

components.name: inject_directive
components.purpose: Injects cognitive routing directive banner (mode, build_allowed, primary action) into CycleBoard HTML.

components.name: profile_report
components.purpose: Generates deep psychological profile from all conversations. Extracts identity patterns, recurring narratives, values, wounds.

components.name: decision_engine
components.purpose: Analyzes intent/resolution/stall/acceleration patterns across all conversations. Computes decision latency and phase distributions.

components.name: belief_core
components.purpose: Extracts 'I am', 'I can', 'I always', 'I never' belief patterns from conversations with frequency counts.

components.name: language_loops
components.purpose: N-gram analysis of conversation patterns to detect recurring language loops and verbal habits.

components.name: semantic_loops
components.purpose: Semantic clustering and loop detection using embeddings. Identifies conversations that revisit the same themes.

components.name: init_embeddings
components.purpose: Vectorizes all conversations using sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384-dim). Bulk initialization of embeddings table in results.db.

components.name: init_topics
components.purpose: Discovers topics via K-means clustering (10 clusters default) on embeddings. Populates topics table.

components.name: init_convo_time
components.purpose: Extracts and normalizes conversation timestamps. Populates convo_time table in results.db.

components.name: init_results_db
components.purpose: Creates SQLite schema for results.db (messages, topics, convo_time, loop_decisions tables).

components.name: init_titles
components.purpose: Extracts conversation titles and maps convo_id to title for lookups.

components.name: cluster_business_topics
components.purpose: Clusters business/wealth-related conversations using embeddings and K-means.

components.name: validate
components.purpose: JSON Schema contract validation engine. require_valid() enforces data contracts before writes.

components.name: model_cache
components.purpose: Singleton cache for sentence-transformers model (all-MiniLM-L6-v2). Prevents reloading across pipeline steps.

components.name: atlas_config
components.purpose: Single source of truth for all governance rules: North Star, targets, behavioral kernel, autonomy levels, agent registry, active lanes, routing thresholds.
outputs: Python constants consumed by governor pipelines

components.name: refresh
components.purpose: Master refresh pipeline. Runs 8 scripts in sequence: loops -> completion_stats -> export_cognitive_state -> route_today -> export_daily_payload -> wire_cycleboard -> reporter -> build_dashboard.

components.name: run_agents
components.purpose: Orchestrates full 5-agent idea pipeline: excavator -> deduplicator -> classifier -> orchestrator -> reporter.

components.name: run_audit
components.purpose: Orchestrates behavioral audit pipeline: conversation classifier -> synthesizer.

components.name: run_daily
components.purpose: Daily loop orchestrator: runs full refresh pipeline, then governor_daily for brief and state generation.

components.name: run_weekly
components.purpose: Weekly loop orchestrator: runs daily loop + behavioral audit + governor_weekly for weekly packet.

components.name: governance_daemon
components.purpose: Autonomous node-cron scheduler running inside delta-kernel API server. Manages 6 scheduled jobs for continuous system operation.
components.trigger: auto-starts with delta-kernel API server (npm run api)

components.name: work_controller
components.purpose: Universal work admission controller. Three primitives: request() (ask permission), complete() (report done), status() (query state). All work — human and machine — passes through this gate.
inputs: work requests from CLI, API, or daemon
components.trigger: called by governance_daemon (every minute) and API endpoints

components.name: delta_kernel_api
components.purpose: Express API server (port 3001) serving delta-fabric storage, governance daemon, work controller, and timeline endpoints. Auto-starts governance daemon on boot.

components.name: idea_dashboard
components.purpose: Interactive HTML dashboard for browsing idea registry tiers, vision clusters, and priority scores.

components.name: dashboard
components.purpose: Main cognitive dashboard showing state history, open loops, completion stats, and loop decisions.

components.name: cycleboard
components.purpose: Daily task management UI with cognitive routing integration. Displays mode, build_allowed, primary action, and open loops.

components.name: contract_schemas
components.purpose: JSON Schema v7 contracts enforcing data shape validation between pipeline stages.
components.trigger: referenced at write-time by scripts using require_valid()

cognitive.description: Analysis, summarization, profiling — understanding what happened and why

components.name: agent_classifier_convo
components.role: Tags every conversation by domain, outcome, trajectory, intensity

components.name: agent_synthesizer
components.role: Cross-references all data into 30-question behavioral audit

components.name: profile_report
components.role: Deep psychological profiling from raw conversations

components.name: decision_engine
components.role: Intent/resolution/stall/acceleration pattern analysis

components.name: belief_core
components.role: Identity belief extraction (I am, I can, I always, I never)

components.name: language_loops
components.role: N-gram verbal habit detection

components.name: semantic_loops
components.role: Semantic loop detection via embedding similarity

components.name: loops
components.role: Open loop detection and lifecycle scoring

components.name: radar
components.role: Rising/falling topic trend detection (90-day window)

components.name: init_embeddings
components.role: Vectorization infrastructure (384-dim embeddings)

components.name: init_topics
components.role: Topic discovery via K-means clustering

operational.description: Tasks, plans, routing, backlog management — what to do and when

components.name: governor_daily
components.role: Daily operating mode + binary decisions + lane violation detection

components.name: governor_weekly
components.role: Weekly reality check + lane progress + stop list + autonomy proposals

components.name: route_today
components.role: Daily mode routing (CLOSURE/MAINTENANCE/BUILD)

components.name: export_daily_payload
components.role: CycleBoard input payload generation

components.name: resurfacer
components.role: Resurfaces oldest unresolved loop for review

components.name: completion_stats
components.role: Closure/archive/decision statistics tracking

components.name: governance_daemon
components.role: Autonomous cron scheduler (heartbeat, refresh, day boundaries, mode recalc, work queue)

components.name: work_controller
components.role: Universal work admission gate (request/complete/status)

components.name: refresh
components.role: Master pipeline orchestrator (8-step daily refresh)

components.name: run_daily
components.role: Daily loop orchestrator (refresh + governor)

components.name: run_weekly
components.role: Weekly loop orchestrator (daily + audit + packet)

components.name: atlas_config
components.role: Governance rules: North Star, targets, autonomy levels, lanes, routing

components.name: wire_cycleboard
components.role: Wires cognitive state into CycleBoard UI

components.name: inject_directive
components.role: Injects mode banner into CycleBoard HTML

financial.description: Offers, revenue, tracking — currently the thinnest layer

components.name: cluster_business_topics
components.role: Clusters business/wealth conversation themes

strategic.description: Patterns, opportunity scanning, idea management — what to bet on

components.name: agent_excavator
components.role: Mines all conversations for ideas/projects/plans

components.name: agent_deduplicator
components.role: Merges 527 raw ideas into canonical entries

components.name: agent_classifier
components.role: Builds idea hierarchy with alignment scoring

components.name: agent_orchestrator
components.role: Priority scoring and tier assignment

components.name: agent_reporter
components.role: Human-readable idea registry with dependency graph

components.name: run_agents
components.role: Full idea intelligence pipeline orchestrator

registered_but_not_built.name: backlog_maintainer
registered_but_not_built.purpose: Merge duplicates, kill low-score items, enforce 2-lane integrity

registered_but_not_built.name: idea_parker
registered_but_not_built.purpose: Auto-park new ideas not aligned with active lanes

data_flow.database: results.db (SQLite: messages, topics, convo_time, embeddings, loop_decisions)
data_flow.validation: JSON Schema v7 via validate.py require_valid()
data_flow.bridge: push_to_delta.py POSTs projections to delta-kernel API on :3001
